label: Gravistimulation / rotation
plain_english_role: A change in shoot orientation relative to gravity.

label: Endodermal statocyte gravity sensing
plain_english_role: A combined sensing context representing gravity perception in shoot endodermal statocyte-like cells.

label: Amyloplast displacement
plain_english_role: Movement or displacement of dense starch-containing organelles after reorientation.

label: LAZY/LZY module
plain_english_role: A signalling module proposed to connect gravity sensing with changes in auxin transport polarity.

label: PIN-mediated auxin redistribution
plain_english_role: Changes in auxin transport that may redistribute auxin across the shoot.

label: Auxin asymmetry
plain_english_role: Unequal auxin distribution across opposite sides of the shoot.

label: Differential cell expansion
plain_english_role: Unequal cell expansion across opposite sides of the shoot.

label: Curvature
plain_english_role: Physical bending of the shoot axis.

label: Shoot gravitropic bending over time
plain_english_role: The time-dependent bending trajectory after gravistimulation.

label: Family / genotype effects
plain_english_role: Inherited background differences that may alter mechanisms or bending trajectories.

label: Gravitropic vs agravitropic families
plain_english_role: An observed grouping based on bending behaviour, not a causal driver in this seed network.
